AircraftComposition.doc: Top-level composition containing all subsystem instances and signal routing.
AircraftComposition.name: AircraftComposition

text.name: text
text.value: Provide full HOTAS pilot controls, digital fly-by-wire channels, and autopilot hold modes.

text.name: text
text.value: It should be an unstable aircraft, the control loop should compensate for this.

text.name: text
text.value: Carry at least 3,100 kg of internal fuel with 8% reserve margin for recovery.

text.name: text
text.value: Support multirole loadouts across nine hardpoints with mission computer stores management.

text.name: text
text.value: Provide Mach 2 dash capability with sustained 9 g maneuver envelope.

text.name: text
text.value: Match F-16 Fighting Falcon geometry: ≈15 m length, 10 m wingspan, single-seat cockpit.

text.name: text
text.value: Integrate an F100/F110 class augmented turbofan with afterburner throttle control.

text.name: text
text.value: The system should be packaged and simulated as a SSP (system structure and parameterization) artifact

text.name: text
text.value: All models should be packaged as FMUs

text.name: text
text.value: It should support loading a number of waypoints that it should fy to in order
